# Seattle Christmas Lights

> Professional Christmas light installation, maintenance, and storage serving Greater Seattle since 2022. Licensed and insured (SEATTPL783M6). Owned and operated by Dylan Thornsberry. Packages from $800-$3,500+. Serving King and Snohomish counties.

## Services
- Christmas Light Installation: [Pricing](/pricing)
- Permanent LED Lighting: [Contact](/contact)
- Seasonal Maintenance: [FAQ](/faq)
- Takedown and Storage: [FAQ](/faq)

## Packages
- Classic Elegance: $800-$1,500 (roofline lighting)
- Signature Display: $1,500-$3,500 (full roofline + entrance package)
- Estate Collection: $3,500+ (comprehensive property lighting)

## All packages include
- Free design consultation
- Commercial-grade LED lighting
- Custom measurements and cutting
- Professional insured installation
- Smart timer programming
- 48-hour service response guarantee
- Post-season removal
- Climate-controlled off-season storage
- 20% returning customer discount

- Phone: (425) 448-4998

- 300+ homes served since 2022
